description: CompositionBlue shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, cut away collar, buttoned front placket, a buttonable patch pocket with a flap on the left chest and a curved hemlineFitSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThe stitch detailing and colour splash on this rakishly designed shirt from basics add rugged styling to your ensemble, while the fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and canvas shoes or with chinos and formal shoes. Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
